description: A template outlining clinical metadata to collect for study subjects.

CDASI.description: Cutaneous Dermatomyositis Disease Area and Severity Index, is a measurement used to characterize cutaneous dermatomyositis severity.
CDASI.title: CDASI

Component.description: A high-level attribute for grouping attributes into templates.
Component.title: Component

PASI.description: Psoriasis Area and Severity Index, is a measurement of the discoloration, thickness, scaling, and coverage of psoriasis plaques.
PASI.title: PASI

VASI.description: Total body Vitiligo Area Severity Index, a measure of the percentage of vitiligo involvement across the body calculated in terms of hand units.
VASI.title: VASI

VETI.description: Vitiligo Extent Tensity Index measures the extent of vitiligo by a numerical score and combines analysis of extensity and severity of vitiligo to produce a constant and reproducible number.
VETI.title: VETI

VIDA.description: Vitiligo Disease Activity Score, a six-point scale that evaluates the activity of vitiligo
VIDA.title: VIDA

age.description: Age at which subject was enrolled in study or age at corresponding visit and data collection event. If value unknown, enter '-1'.
age.title: age

ageUnits.description: The unit of measure used for `ageEnrollment` and `ageDiagnosis`
ageUnits.title: ageUnits

comorbidities.description: Any diseases or medical condition that is simultaneously present in addition to `diagnosis`.
comorbidities.title: comorbidities

diagnosis.description: A high-level classifier indicating the disease status of an individual.
diagnosis.title: diagnosis

heightUnits.description: Unit of measure of value provided for `height`.
heightUnits.title: heightUnits

individualID.description: Unique identifier assigned to each study participant. For multi-specimen data files provide all IDs in a comma-separated list.
individualID.title: individualID

notes.description: Please use this attribute to captured pertinent details not otherwise captured. This is an unstructured text entry, please be concise.
notes.title: notes

program.description: Name of the funding program that supported the generation of data and associated files
program.title: program

project.description: A sub-level attribute of `program` specifying a research initiative working to investigate particular hypotheses.
project.title: project

race.description: A textual description of a person's race.
enum: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
race.title: race

sex.description: A textual description of a person's sex at birth.
sex.title: sex

species.description: The genus species of sample or subject origin.
species.title: species

visitID.description: Ordinal ID distinguishing different patient visits.
visitID.title: visitID

vitiligoPattern.description: A high-level classification of vitiligo based on the distribution and patterning of lesions across the body.
vitiligoPattern.title: vitiligoPattern

weight.description: Weight of subject. If value unknown, enter '-1'.
weight.title: weight

weightUnits.description: Abbreviated unit of measure of value provided for `weight`.
weightUnits.title: weightUnits

title: ClinicalMetadataTemplate
